spec_match.rationale: The native panel now uses focusgroup="radiogroup block nomemory" with focusgroupstart, matching current radiogroup guidance for a vertical custom radio set.

interactive.rationale: Click selection and focusgroupstart updates are implemented in source, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for keyboard verification.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page copy and code sample now teach radiogroup/block/nomemory rather than the obsolete focusgroup="vertical" value.

edge_cases.rationale: The comparison covers native and manual roving tabindex paths, but wrapping and memory behavior still need browser confirmation.

references.rationale: The page links to ChromeStatus and the current scoped Open UI explainer.

design_system.rationale: The component keeps existing CSS variables, high-contrast checked states, and visible focus outlines.

openQuestions.title: Verify radiogroup keyboard movement
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp in Chrome 150+ to Tab into the focusgroup radiogroup, press Up/Down, confirm focus movement and focusgroupstart re-entry, compare the manual panel, and inspect console/network.

summary: Static repair updated the radiogroup to the current scoped syntax and keeps selection JavaScript separate from native focus movement; browser verification is still pending.
